ls.name: ls
ls.description: List directory contents. Displays folder names with a trailing slash '/' and file sizes in human-readable bytes.

cd.name: cd
cd.description: Change working directory. Supports relative path '..' and absolute paths like '/data'. If no path is provided, falls back to '/'.

pwd.name: pwd
pwd.description: Print working directory. Output the absolute path of the current directory.

cat.name: cat
cat.description: Concatenate and display file content on the stdout.

cp.name: cp
cp.description: Copy a file from source to destination path. Preserves binary data.

mv.name: mv
mv.description: Move or rename a file. Performs a copy followed by deleting the source file.

mkdir.name: mkdir
mkdir.description: Create a new directory on the SD card.

touch.name: touch
touch.description: Create an empty file if it does not exist.

rm.name: rm
rm.description: Delete a file or an empty directory.

echo.name: echo
echo.description: Print text to stdout. If redirect operator '>' is present, writes the text to the specified file.

open.name: open
open.description: Open a file using the Web OS default associated application.

grep.name: grep
grep.description: Search for pattern inside the specified file and display matching lines with line numbers.

find.name: find
find.description: Recursively search for files/directories matching the pattern under the specified path.

wc.name: wc
wc.description: Print newline, word, and byte counts for the specified file.

head.name: head
head.description: Output the first part (default 10 lines) of a file.

tail.name: tail
tail.description: Output the last part (default 10 lines) of a file.

df.name: df
df.description: Show free and used space on the SD Card filesystem.

uptime.name: uptime
uptime.description: Display device uptime, active session info, and free memory heap.

ping.name: ping
ping.description: Send network requests to measure round-trip time (RTT) latency to Cardputer or external host.

curl.name: curl
curl.description: Fetch and display raw text content from the specified URL.

wget.name: wget
wget.description: Download a file from URL to the specified SD card path.

sleep.name: sleep
sleep.description: Delay execution for the specified number of seconds (accepts decimals).

export.name: export
export.description: Set environment variables or list all marked variables if called without arguments.

uname.name: uname
uname.description: Print system information. Flag -a prints machine architecture (esp32s3) and hardware info.

status.name: status
status.description: Display diagnostic summary of heap memory, SD storage, network connectivity, and OTA partitions.

free.name: free
free.description: Show free heap memory pool on the microcontroller.

date.name: date
date.description: Display current local date and time.

theme.name: theme
theme.description: View or switch the system UI theme.
